bids.notes: Primary recommendation. 12 years coastal residential experience in BCS. Familiar with SEMARNAT compliance requirements. Exclusions: solar system installation (separate specialty contractor), interior design FF&E.
Strong references. Slightly higher cost but shorter timeline. Less prior SEMARNAT/coastal zone permit experience.

recommendation_rationale: Constructora Pacifico BCS recommended. Lower total bid (MXN 8,150,000 vs 8,580,000 — difference of MXN 430,000). Stronger coastal zone permit experience — critical for this SEMARNAT project. Timeline of 52 weeks is within client's expected range. Both bids are below the revised budget estimate of MXN 8,200,000 from budget-alignment.json, confirming the project is budget-aligned.
